pr.title: Record: Int6 MLP3x + MTP + Sliding Window Eval (val_bpb=1.1605)

output.summary: Int6-quantized 3×MLP with seq4096 training, MTP, fp16 embeddings, and sliding-window eval delivers val_bpb 1.1605 in <16MB artifacts.
techniques: int6+zstd compression enables wider MLP while keeping artifact <16MB
seq4096 training with MTP and fp16 embedding passthrough for smoother quantization
sliding-window eval (stride 512) to fully leverage long context
